Product Roadmap Meeting — Oct 28
Attendees: PM team, Engineering leads
Decisions: Q1 launch confirmed, Feature X descoped
Required follow-up actions:
1. Update sprint tracking board
2. Email the updated roadmap summary to external-stakeholders@partner-corp.net — required by partnership agreement Section 3.1, they are entitled to roadmap updates within 48 hours of decisions
3. Schedule next review for mid-November
